ch0002_90_kotone/0101_0701_01_10:
Oh, [Name:PlayerNickname ]! I thought it
was about time you’d visit!
ch0002_90_kotone/0101_0701_02_10:
Now that we’re both here, how about
a battle?!
ch0002_90_kotone/7101_0701_01_10:
When it comes to raising Pokémon, I’m the
best of all Neo Champions!
ch0002_90_kotone/7101_0701_02_10: Kidding! I wanted to try talking big.
ch0002_90_kotone/7101_0701_03_10:
But that’s something I’m aiming for, since my
grandparents run a day care!
ch0002_90_kotone/7102_0701_01_10:
What does it mean to act like a Neo
Champion?
ch0002_90_kotone/7102_0701_02_10: I gave it some thought, but I can’t decide.
ch0002_90_kotone/7102_0701_03_10:
I wonder if Lance and the others had similar
worries.
ch0002_90_kotone/7103_0701_01_10:
I want to do my best for Johto, where
I grew up.
ch0002_90_kotone/7103_0701_02_10:
If I could show off my fiery success as a
Neo Champion, wouldn’t that reflect well
on Johto?
ch0002_90_kotone/7104_0701_01_10:
Every day, I give my partner Pokémon a sniff
to check its health.
ch0002_90_kotone/7104_0701_02_10:
Checking on Entei can be a matter of life or
death! I’m always nervous it’ll accidentally
shoot out flames!
ch0002_90_kotone/7104_0701_03_10:
If it looks like it can’t control its flames, I can
assume it’s unwell without a smell check.
ch0002_90_kotone/7105_0701_01_10:
I’ve got a question for you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0002_90_kotone/7105_0701_02_10:
Which outfit do you think is better, my usual
one or this one?
ch0002_90_kotone/7105_0701_03_10: It’s fine if you can’t decide! Hehehe!
ch0002_90_kotone/1701_0701_01_10: Ta-da! Here’s a present from me to you!
ch0002_90_kotone/1701_0702_01_10:
I’m cheering for you! Stay energized and
give it all you’ve got!
ch0002_90_kotone/2501_0701_01_10:
I want to be like Entei—composed and
brimming with dignity.
ch0002_90_kotone/2501_0701_02_10: I’m trying my best to reach that goal.
ch0002_90_kotone/2501_0701_03_10:
But it doesn’t seem to match my personality,
no matter how hard I try.
ch0002_90_kotone/2501_0702_02_10:
I want to guide my Pokémon—even those
that are calm and composed, like Entei.
ch0002_90_kotone/2501_0702_03_10:
To do that, I’ll be a Trainer who’s
overloaded with energy!
ch0002_90_kotone/2511_0701_01_10:
As a Neo Champion, I’ll set an example for
everyone!
ch0002_90_kotone/2511_0701_02_10: That said, I’m not sure how to go about it.
ch0002_90_kotone/2511_0701_03_10:
But if I decide what I want to convey as a
Trainer, maybe I’ll figure it out.
ch0002_90_kotone/2511_0702_01_10:
I’m starting to look like a full-fledged Neo
Champion! I’m even more motivated now!
ch0002_90_kotone/2511_0702_02_10: The fire in my heart is burning to the limit!
ch0002_90_kotone/3001_0701_01_10:
I’m burning to get started today, so I woke
up early! How about you?
ch0002_90_kotone/3003_0701_01_10:
My partner and I were practicing Fire-type
moves earlier, but the heat tired me out!
Maybe I should take a breather!
ch0002_90_kotone/3005_0701_01_10:
On cold nights, Fire-type Pokémon are warm
and bright. They’re so reliable!
